displayName: STEF Composite (Soviet multilayer armor, T-80 family)
notes: STEF (Стеклотекстолит ЭФ-32-301/Ф-1) — Soviet fiberglass-reinforced phenolic composite. Density ~2.5 g/cm³. RHAe ~1.7-2.0 per mm vs KE. Used in T-80 hull behind cast steel outer layer. Layered glass-fabric with epoxy-phenolic binder. Provides structural rigidity and spall resistance. Temperature range -50 to +60°C.
